description: Validate the OpenICE Respiratory Rate Calculator algorithm using a simulated Capnograph or Capnometer device (do not use a Multiparameter Monitor). Compare the source Respiratory Rate from the device with the calculated rate in the application. Create a validation report at /home/ga/Desktop/rr_validation_report.txt including the device type, the source RR value, the calculated RR value, and a statement confirming if the values match.
